qry:select.name: qry_ultimo_nivel
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT DCO.c_ultimo_nivel FROM PRE05_DET_CONCEPTOS AS DCO, PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER, PRE05_LEGAJOS AS LEG, PRE11_CONC_ITEMS AS CIT, PRE11_GRU_ITEMS AS GRU, PRE11_ITEMS AS ITE, PRE11_NIVELES AS NIV, PRE18_CLASE_ITEM as CLA, PRE19_TIPO_ITEM as TIP, PRE06_EST_REPORTE as EST, PRE06_NODOS as NOD1, PRE06_NODOS as NOD2, PRE06_NODOS as NOD3 JOIN DCO.oi_detalle_pres INNER DET.oi_detalle_pres, DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal, LEG.oi_legajo INNER DCO.oi_legajo, CIT.oi_concepto INNER DCO.oi_concepto, LEG.oi_grupo INNER GRU.oi_grupo, GRU.oi_item INNER CIT.oi_item, CIT.oi_item INNER ITE.oi_item, ITE.oi_nivel INNER NIV.oi_nivel, CLA.oi_clase_item INNER ITE.oi_clase_item, TIP.oi_tipo_item INNER ITE.oi_tipo_item, EST.oi_nodo INNER NOD1.oi_nodo, NOD1.oi_nodo INNER NOD2.oi_nodo_padre, NOD2.oi_nodo INNER NOD3.oi_nodo_padre, NOD3.c_valor_iden INNER DCO.c_ultimo_nivel WHERE LEG.oi_escenario = {#SOURCE:@oi_escenario} and PER.l_afecto_total = 1 and NIV.oi_def_reporte = {#SOURCE:@oi_def_reporte} and EST.oi_est_reporte = {#SOURCE:@oi_est_reporte} GROUP BY DCO.c_ultimo_nivel
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: DEFqry_reporte
DEFqry_detalle
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT DET.oi_detalle_pres, PER.d_periodo_fiscal FROM PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER JOIN DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal WHERE DET.oi_escenario = {#PARAMIN:@oi_escenario} AND PER.l_afecto_total = 1
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_datos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT max(NOD1.d_nodo) as d_nodo_1, max(NOD2.d_nodo) as d_nodo_2, max(NOD3.d_nodo) as d_nodo_3, max(CLA.d_clase_item) as d_clase_item, max(TIP.d_tipo_item) as d_tipo_item, max(ITE.d_item) as d_item, SUM(DCO.n_valor_final) AS suma, CIT.oi_item, DCO.c_ultimo_nivel FROM PRE05_DET_CONCEPTOS AS DCO, PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER, PRE05_LEGAJOS AS LEG, PRE11_CONC_ITEMS AS CIT, PRE11_GRU_ITEMS AS GRU, PRE11_ITEMS AS ITE, PRE11_NIVELES AS NIV, PRE18_CLASE_ITEM as CLA, PRE19_TIPO_ITEM as TIP, PRE06_EST_REPORTE as EST, PRE06_NODOS as NOD1, PRE06_NODOS as NOD2, PRE06_NODOS as NOD3 JOIN DCO.oi_detalle_pres INNER DET.oi_detalle_pres, DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal, LEG.oi_legajo INNER DCO.oi_legajo, CIT.oi_concepto INNER DCO.oi_concepto, LEG.oi_grupo INNER GRU.oi_grupo, GRU.oi_item INNER CIT.oi_item, CIT.oi_item INNER ITE.oi_item, ITE.oi_nivel INNER NIV.oi_nivel, CLA.oi_clase_item INNER ITE.oi_clase_item, TIP.oi_tipo_item INNER ITE.oi_tipo_item, EST.oi_nodo INNER NOD1.oi_nodo, NOD1.oi_nodo INNER NOD2.oi_nodo_padre, NOD2.oi_nodo INNER NOD3.oi_nodo_padre, NOD3.c_valor_iden INNER DCO.c_ultimo_nivel WHERE LEG.oi_escenario = {#SOURCE:@oi_escenario} and PER.l_afecto_total = 1 and NIV.oi_def_reporte = {#SOURCE:@oi_def_reporte} and EST.oi_est_reporte = {#SOURCE:@oi_est_reporte} and DCO.c_ultimo_nivel in (\'{%=#SOURCE:@c_ultimos_niveles%}\') GROUP BY CIT.oi_item, DCO.c_ultimo_nivel order by d_nodo_2 asc, d_nodo_3 asc, d_clase_item asc, d_tipo_item asc, d_item asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_periodos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT DET.oi_detalle_pres, PER.d_periodo_fiscal FROM PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER JOIN DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal WHERE DET.oi_escenario = {#SOURCE:@oi_escenario} AND PER.l_afecto_total = 1
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_todos_detalles
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT SUM(DCO.n_valor_final) AS suma, DCO.oi_detalle_pres, CIT.oi_item, DCO.c_ultimo_nivel FROM PRE05_DET_CONCEPTOS AS DCO, PRE03_DETALLES AS DET, PRE01_PER_FISCAL AS PER, PRE05_LEGAJOS AS LEG, PRE11_CONC_ITEMS AS CIT, PRE11_GRU_ITEMS AS GRU, PRE11_ITEMS AS ITE, PRE11_NIVELES AS NIV, PRE18_CLASE_ITEM as CLA, PRE19_TIPO_ITEM as TIP, PRE06_EST_REPORTE as EST, PRE06_NODOS as NOD1, PRE06_NODOS as NOD2, PRE06_NODOS as NOD3 JOIN DCO.oi_detalle_pres INNER DET.oi_detalle_pres, DET.oi_periodo_fiscal INNER PER.oi_periodo_fiscal, LEG.oi_legajo INNER DCO.oi_legajo, CIT.oi_concepto INNER DCO.oi_concepto, LEG.oi_grupo INNER GRU.oi_grupo, GRU.oi_item INNER CIT.oi_item, CIT.oi_item INNER ITE.oi_item, ITE.oi_nivel INNER NIV.oi_nivel, CLA.oi_clase_item INNER ITE.oi_clase_item, TIP.oi_tipo_item INNER ITE.oi_tipo_item, EST.oi_nodo INNER NOD1.oi_nodo, NOD1.oi_nodo INNER NOD2.oi_nodo_padre, NOD2.oi_nodo INNER NOD3.oi_nodo_padre, NOD3.c_valor_iden INNER DCO.c_ultimo_nivel WHERE LEG.oi_escenario = {#SOURCE:@oi_escenario} and PER.l_afecto_total = 1 and NIV.oi_def_reporte = {#SOURCE:@oi_def_reporte} and EST.oi_est_reporte = {#SOURCE:@oi_est_reporte} and DCO.c_ultimo_nivel in (\'{%=#SOURCE:@c_ultimos_niveles%}\') GROUP BY DCO.oi_detalle_pres, CIT.oi_item, DCO.c_ultimo_nivel order by oi_detalle_pres asc
')/ROWS/ROW
